title: Know Me Better
subtitle: A dedicated academician with nearly two decades of experience in teaching, research, and mentoring students in the field of Electrical Engineering.
heading: Professor at Rajalakshmi Engineering College
paragraph1: With a Ph.D. in Power Electronics and Drives from Anna University, Chennai, I have dedicated my career to advancing the field of electrical engineering through research and teaching. My work focuses on developing innovative solutions in renewable energy systems, power converters, and smart grid technologies.
paragraph2: I secured University Second Rank in M.E (Power Electronics and Drives) with 9.21 CGPA. My research has resulted in 34 journal publications, 4 patents, and 3 books.

expertiseAreas.title: Power Electronics
expertiseAreas.description: DC-DC converters, inverters, and power factor correction systems

expertiseAreas.title: Renewable Energy
expertiseAreas.description: Solar PV systems, MPPT algorithms, and energy storage

expertiseAreas.title: Electric Drives
expertiseAreas.description: Motor control, BLDC drives, and variable speed systems

expertiseAreas.title: IoT & Automation
expertiseAreas.description: Smart systems, home automation, and embedded solutions
